title: Technology Resources: Cybersecurity
description: This policy governs how the school district protects its technology systems, networks, and digital data from cybersecurity threats and unauthorized access. It applies to the district as a whole, including staff, students, and the technology infrastructure used to support school operations. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it helps safeguard sensitive student and family information stored in district systems, ensuring that personal data remains secure.

timeline_local.summary: Revisions to Board Policy CQB (Local) were adopted unanimously at the November 18, 2025 Regular Board Meeting as part of a group adoption (Motion #7207). No specific language changes are described in the meeting minutes.
timeline_local.notes: Adopted as part of a group motion (#7207) along with BBE, CAA, CDA, EHB, EHBB, and GKB. Vote was 7-0. The specific redline changes are not described in these minutes pages.

timeline_local.summary: This is a local policy for Conroe ISD establishing cybersecurity requirements including: developing a cybersecurity plan, designating a cybersecurity coordinator, delegating training authority to the Superintendent, and establishing security breach notification procedures. The policy was issued 2023-10-30 (Version 1), suggesting this may be a new or recently adopted policy being documented.
changes_added: who will oversee implementation of the district's cybersecurity plan and required staff training (underlined text in the Coordinator section)

description_local: This policy establishes the rules and requirements for protecting the school district's technology systems and digital information from cyber threats. It applies to the district as a whole, requiring the designation of a cybersecurity coordinator and the development of a formal cybersecurity plan. This matters to parents and community members because it helps ensure that sensitive student and family data stored by the district is safeguarded against breaches or cyberattacks.
